title: Command Cockpit Stable Board
summary: Kept the Command Cockpit selected path stable during interaction and gave the Quest board more premium first-screen presence.
changes: Routes repeated detail-panel auto-scroll calls through a cockpit-aware helper so Command Cockpit lane changes update in place.
Adds a tighter overview-only cockpit layout with a shorter HUD, stronger board framing, and more first-screen room for the Quest surface.
Adds a calm board-scan animation to the Quest cockpit so motion emphasizes live state instead of extra vertical widgets.
